nasb.text: As they had their pasture, they became satisfied, And being satisfied, their heart became proud; Therefore they forgot Me.

esv.text: but when they had grazed, they became full, they were filled, and their heart was lifted up; therefore they forgot me.

cnv.text: 但他們得了餵養而飽足， 飽足以後，就心高氣傲， 因此忘記了我。

ccb.text: 但你们吃得饱足以后， 就心高气傲，忘记了我。
